Title: P9_ValidateDRPlanDocumentation
Step Action: Confirm that Disaster Recovery planning ticket has been created
Step Expected Result: DR planning ticket exists in Jira/ADO

Step Action: Verify the ticket description includes DR strategy
column5: All required DR planning elements documented

Step Action: Request DR plan documentation from Infrastructure Team
Review DR plan for completeness: backup strategy
column6: Plan addresses all critical recovery scenarios

Step Action: Confirm all critical infrastructure components are included in the DR plan
Verify Infrastructure Team sign-off on the DR plan

Title: P9_ValidateDRBackupRestore
Step Action: Confirm database backups have been configured and scheduled
Request Infrastructure/DBA Team to execute a test backup

Step Expected Result: All data captured in backup without corruption

Step Action: Request test restore to alternate location or instance
Confirm restored data matches original data (integrity check)
Measure recovery time from backup to fully restored state
Step Expected Result: Recovery time documented and meets RTO objectives

Step Action: Verify Disaster Recovery procedures are documented and accessible to operations team
Step Expected Result: DR runbook available and reviewed by operations team
